title: CRYSTALIA Premium Drinking Glasses Set of 6 Tall Glass Tumbler 360ml LEAD FREE Water Glasses, Heavy Base Highball Glass Water Tumblers, Cocktail, Milkshake, Milk, Iced Tea, Soda Glasses Juice Glasses
features: PERFECT DRINKING GLASS SET: Ideal for everyday glass tumblers for any beverage including juices, cocktail, water, soda, milkshakes and smoothies. Made of high quality, durable bar glasses. Weighted bottom enhances stability. Perfect for your dinner table.

HIGH-QUALITY GLASSWARE SET: Taking inspiration from classic glassware design, each glass cup features a ridged multi-faceted shape that promotes stability and balance - secure in the hand and less likely to roll off a surface if knocked over.

PLEASE PAY ATTENTION TO SIZE: 12 ¼ oz (360 cc) Capacity CLASSIC STYLE VINTAGE: These exquisite 6 piece European vintage glassware drinking set preserve beverage’s crisp, rich texture for a fresh taste every time. Capacity: 12 ¼ oz (360 cc) Diameter: 3.15 inches (80mm) Height: 5.8 inches (148 mm), These tall glasses are dishwasher safe, for hassle free cleaning

PERFECT GIFT SET FOR ANY HOME: Christmas, birthday gifts, wedding party, your best selling Beverage, Valentine's day, anniversary, Father's day, Mother's day, housewarming, new years, college graduation, St. Patrick's day, Congratulations, job Promotion, stocking stuffers and secret Santa gifts

RISK FREE PURCHASE: Securely packaged in shipping box. For the long and complicated shipping processes, if the products you received are broken, please contact us ASAP. We guarantee to offer you a replacement.
